titleStmt.title: SII 19.400: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 400. (A.R. No. 621 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI NEAR KĀṬṬUMANNĀRKŌYIL, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON DETACHED STONES IN THE maṇḍapa BEHIND THE NAVAGRAHA IMAGES, ANANTĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: Portions of this inscription are lost. It records the purchase of two plots of adjacent lands, one belonging to the sabhā of Mēl-Ilattūr and the other to that of Mēṟ-Chenninallūr in Veṇṇaiyūr-nāḍu by two merchants, Tiruvaraṅgadēvar and his brother Aiyaṇattēvar, who formed them into a unit called Nindādityanallūr after their deceased uncle Daśanāgaṉ Nindan, and adding thereto another 3 vēli of land after purchasing the same from the sabhā of Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, thus making an extent of 20(1/2) vēli and 1 mā in all, endowed the whole for the daily feeding of 100 persons including 20 Brāhmaṇas, in the hall built by them in the temple of Dvārāpati-Paramasvāmi in the village in memory of the deceased person. The assembly of Vīranārā- yaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam is stated to have received from the donors, 300 kaḻañju of gold as tiruttu-vīs11am for reclaiming for cultivation the three vēli sold by them. This is probably an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecarivarmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārāyaṇa ścaturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīmatdvārāpati paramasvāmiuṭaiya koyililey ca
�kkavāṇiyaṉ daśanākaṉ nindaṉukkāka Ivaṉ tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷ tiruvaraṅkatevaṉum Aiyyaṇattevaṉum Ivviruvarum Ipparamasvāmi tirunāmattāl koṇṭu tanta nilamāvaṉa veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam melilattūr sabhaiyārpakkal Ivvūr melkaḻani candrādityavat Iṟaiili
rkkellai koṇṭalvāykku meṟkun teṉpārkkellai Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam meṟceṉṉi nallūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Immeṟceṉṉinallūr Ellaikkey kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tuvāykkālukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilaṉ
ramasvāmi tirunāmattāley Ivarkaḷey koṇṭu tan=ta nilaṉ Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam meṟceṉṉinallūr sabhaiyārpakkal Ivvūrkkiḻ kaḻaṉi candrādityavat Iṟaiili vilaikkuk koṇṭa nilam 5 10� Iṉṉilam Añcaraiyey Oru māvukku kiḻpārkkellai koṇṭal vāykku meṟkum teṉ
rkkellai centaṉ vāy ceṉṟu parivattaṉaivākkālukkey pāynta ne kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ipparamasvāmi nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nila mikutikkuṟaiyum Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ 5 �pa Iṉṉilam Añcaraiye Oru māvum Āka nilam 2 10 5
ni nindādityanallūrāvatākavum Iṉnindādityanallūr koṇṭu candrādityavat nicatamum Ūṭṭakkaṭava kalam 8 10 Eṇpatum Ūṭṭak kaṭavomākavum Iyāṇṭu śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturvvedi- maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyār Ipparamasvāmi tirunāmattāl viṟṟut tan=ta nilam putuppaṭi muveliyum Immuveli nilattukkum
tāḷkuṭi Ellaikku kiḻakku kuṇṭaiyūrkkup poṉa peruvaḻikku teṟkum maṇṭakappuṟamāṉa nilattukku meṟkumāka Iṉṉaṭuviṭṭa nilaṉ mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ 3li Immuveliyum Itu kollaiyāka Āḻvār bhaṇṭārattu Itiṉukku tiruttuvicam Illāmaiyil daśanākaṉ ṉindan brāhmaṇabhojaṉattu
l tiruttu vicamākak koṇṭa poṉ 3 100� Ippoṉ muṉṉūṟṟuk kaḻañcun tiruttuvicamākak koṇṭu Iṉṉilattil bhogattile Irupatu kalamum candrādityavat Ūṭṭakkaṭavomākavum Iṉṉilattukku Ūnā tiruttam varilum Itin bhogam potilum potāviṭilum Ipparamasvāmikku śrīkāryyañ ceykiṉṟāre Irupatu kalamum candrāditya
ṉṉūṟum Iṉnmindānallūr nilam Irupataraiyey Orumāvum koṇṭu Emperumāṉ koyilil Ivarkaḷ Eṭuppitta cālaiyile nicatam Oru nāḻi neyyum ṉālu kaṟiyum veṟṟilai Añcum pākkiraṇṭum Oru kalam nāḻi morumāka nicatam Irunūṟu kalamum daśanākaṉ nindaṉukkāka candrādityavat Ūṭṭakkaṭavomāka Icaintu Ipparicu kallil �
gāvindaṉeṉ ḷaddharmmammahāsabhaiyār rakṣai ḷaddharmmam rakṣippār śrīpādadhūbi Aṭiyom talaimeliṉa ..
Digital edition of SII 19.400 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
